Document:
# Investigator
The Investigator operates within the Guard department but with a different focus: detection over patrol. Using magical vision and analytical skills, Investigators uncover hidden contraband, trace magical activity, and build cases that ordinary Guards cannot crack.
## Responsibilities
- Investigate crimes, theft, and suspicious activity - Detect magical contraband and hidden items using magic vision - Interview witnesses and gather evidence - Build cases to support Guard Commander decisions - Identify magic-users operating outside the law
## Unique Skills
[bold][color=#5EABEB]Toggle Magic Vision[/color][/bold] — reveals magical auras on entities and players. Use this to spot enchanted items, hidden contraband, and illegal magical tools.
[bold][color=#5EABEB]Magic Splitting[/color][/bold] — a detection-oriented ability used to analyze the magical properties of objects.
## Requirements
[bold]1 hour[/bold] in the Guard department. Salary: [bold]75 coins[/bold] per cycle.
## Tips
- Use [color=#5EABEB]Magic Vision[/color] frequently — it reveals things a standard Guard would walk past - Document findings before acting — an Investigator needs evidence, not just suspicion - Coordinate with the Guard Commander before making any arrest - Your role is intelligence and investigation, not patrol — let Guards handle crowd control
